news.headline: RevitPay appoints Jack Berry as Chief Revenue Officer, bringing 8 years of payments industry experience and success.
news.summary: In Cleveland, RevitPay, a prominent payment processing and merchant services company, has welcomed Jack Berry as their Chief Revenue Officer. Berry, who boasts more than eight years of experience in the payments sector and previously served as CSO at PaymentCloud, has a strong history of achievements. Notably, he oversaw major merchants and played a key role in establishing PaymentCloud's Cleveland office. Berry's appointment signifies RevitPay's commitment to innovation in the industry.

news.headline: Suzanne E. Afflalo, MD recognized as Pinnacle Lifetime Member in The Inner Circle for her work as a Family Medicine Specialist and Community Advocate.
news.summary: On February 21, 2025, in San Diego, Dr. Suzanne E. Afflalo was recognized as a Pinnacle Lifetime Member in The Inner Circle for her work as a Compassionate Family Medicine Specialist and Community Advocate. Dr. Afflalo is acknowledged for her significant contributions in the field.

news.headline: Vijay S. Iyer, MD, Ph.D, FACC, is honored as a Pinnacle Lifetime Member in The Inner Circle for his work in Complex Cardiac and Structural Interventions.
news.summary: In East Amherst, New York on February 21, 2025, acclaimed cardiologist Vijay S. Iyer was recognized in The Inner Circle as a Pinnacle Lifetime Member for his expertise in Complex Cardiac and Structural Interventions. Dr. Vijay S. Iyer, MD, Ph.D., FACC, has made significant contributions to the field and is esteemed for his work in this specialized area.

news.headline: Carman Bailey named Pinnacle Professional Member in The Inner Circle for innovation in Safety and Environmental Health.
news.summary: In a recent news release on February 21, 2025, in Lagrange, Georgia, Carman Bailey has been recognized in The Inner Circle as a distinguished Pinnacle Professional Member Inner Circle of Excellence for his outstanding work as a Leading Innovator in Safety and Environmental Health. Bailey is praised for his significant contributions to the field.

news.headline: Nicole McConnell recognized as Most Trusted Healthcare Professional in Obstetrics and Gynecology by The Inner Circle.
news.summary: On February 21, 2025, in Brandon, Florida, Nicole McConnell was recognized in The Inner Circle as one of the Most Trusted Healthcare Professionals for her significant work in Obstetrics and Gynecology. Holding Bachelor's degrees in both Psychology, Dr. McConnell stands out in her field.

news.headline: Dr. Andy Honda recognized as a Pinnacle Professional Member in The Inner Circle for medical leadership.
news.summary: On February 21, 2025, in New York City, Dr. Andy Honda was recognized as a distinguished member of The Inner Circle and granted the title of Pinnacle Professional Member Inner Circle of Excellence. Dr. Honda's expertise lies in medical executive leadership, particularly in strategic implementation within medical communications and marketing. This recognition highlights her exceptional achievements in the field.

news.headline: BoC's Gov. Macklem: Our model shows that exports would fall 8.5% in the year after tariffs took effect.
FDA layoffs drastically reduced teams evaluating AI and food safety. Units reviewing surgical robots and insulin systems were hit hard despite industry-funded salaries.
news.summary: Departments responsible for assessing advanced surgical robots and insulin delivery systems faced significant staff reductions under the Trump administration, despite the fact that the salaries of these employees were funded by industry fees rather than taxpayer money.

news.headline: BoC's Gov. Macklem: The updated BoC model shows Canadian output would fall almost 3% over two years if US imposed tariffs, all but wiping out growth forecast for 2025 and 2026.
BoC's Gov. Macklem: If U. tariffs are long-lasting and broad-based, there will not be a bounce back.
BoC's Gov. Macklem: The initial impact of tariffs would be a one-time rise in prices, monetary policy must ensure higher prices do not become ongoing inflation.
Anchor Health Properties celebrates 40 years, focusing on medical outpatient buildings and specialty healthcare. Founded in 1985.
news.summary: In Charlottesville, Virginia, on February 21, 2025, Anchor Health Properties (Anchor) announced its achievements since its establishment in 1985. Anchor is a prominent national company specializing in the development, management, and investment in healthcare real estate, with a particular focus on medical outpatient buildings and specialty healthcare facilities. With nearly 40 years of experience, Anchor has become a leader in this sector, managing a significant portfolio of properties across the country.

news.headline: BoC's Gov. Macklem: The BoC wants to consider the interaction of monetary policy and housing, does persistently high shelter price inflation distort measures of core inflation?
BoC's Gov. Macklem: The renewal will look at whether the BoC needs richer monetary policy playbook and how to measure underlying inflation.
BoC's Gov. Macklem: The BoC's focus will be on how we can improve the framework and its implementation to best address structural changes.
US and Ukraine are in discussions to finalize deal on critical minerals.
BoC's Gov. Macklem: Now is not the time to question the anchor that has proven so effective.
BoC's Gov. Macklem: 2026 monetary policy framework renewal should leave the 2% inflation target unchanged.

Stripe and PayPal fuel stablecoin expansion, says Polygon Labs. Stablecoin industry now at $230B, over 1% of US money supply.
news.summary: The stablecoin sector has expanded significantly, now reaching a $230 billion valuation. This represents over 1% of the total US money supply.

news.headline: Nubank stocks drop due to Real's devaluation affecting earnings - major hit on profit margins.
ALSCO Teamsters in South ratify contracts - 20 local unions, 300 workers secure pension increases, improved benefits.
news.summary: 300 laundry workers spanning seven states have successfully secured pension increases and improved protections. The Teamsters at 20 local unions voted to ratify two regional agreements with Alsco. The three-year contracts entail enhanced training opportunities and meeting pay for the workers.

news.headline: Trump's 25% tariffs target industries with trade deficits; 4 crucial tariff deadlines approaching for various sectors.
news.summary: Tariffs imposed by the Trump administration, set at 25%, are expected to impact three industries characterized by significant trade deficits by April 2, in addition to three previous tariff deadlines. These measures are part of a broader strategy to address trade imbalances.

news.headline: Booking Holdings Inc. (BKNG) surpassed Q4 expectations, with $5.471 billion revenue, $6,000 price target set by analysts.
news.summary: Booking Holdings Inc. (NASDAQ:BKNG) saw its shares rise after reporting strong fourth-quarter results. Goldman Sachs analyst Eric Sheridan kept a Neutral rating but increased the price target from $4,860 to $5,020. Booking Holdings surpassed expectations in gross bookings, room nights, revenue, and adjusted EBITDA, with Europe as the main driver. Management foresees growth in nights and bookings of 5%-7% in Q1, using AI to boost customer conversion and enhance services. B Riley Securities' Naved Khan maintained a Buy rating, raising the price target to $6,000. Fourth-quarter revenues stood at $5.471 billion, up 14.4% YoY, exceeding the $5.180 billion consensus. Marketing efficiency improved by 30 basis points YoY, with a bright 2025 outlook for sustained strength and margin expansion.

news.headline: IDEMIA Public Security partners with WV DMV and Samsung to bring Mobile ID to Samsung Wallet in West Virginia, Feb 21, 2025. Residents can access WV Mobile ID securely.
news.summary: Residents in West Virginia now have the ability to utilize their secure and reliable West Virginia Mobile ID through Samsung Wallet. This innovative service was made possible through the collaboration between IDEMIA Public Security North America, a prominent provider of secure biometric solutions, and a partner organization. This update, announced on February 21, 2025 in Reston, Virginia, offers residents a more convenient way to access important identification information.

news.headline: Manufacturing design workflows are revolutionized by Generative AI, cutting costs and time significantly, as per NVIDIA.
news.summary: According to recent findings, Generative AI is revolutionizing manufacturing design processes, providing cutting-edge solutions that lead to decreased expenses and time savings. These advances are highlighted in a report from NVIDIA.

news.headline: Dow Jones drops 350 points due to UnitedHealth probe; Coinbase rises as U.S. lawsuit dropped.
news.summary: Stocks on the Dow Jones Industrial Average experienced a significant drop of 350 points in today's stock market trading following reports of a federal investigation into UnitedHealth. Concurrently, Coinbase saw an increase as the United States decided to drop a lawsuit against them. This development was covered in real-time by Investor's Business Daily.

news.headline: AXIOS Reporter on X: Trump told Brian Kilmeade Netanyahu "is not torn” about the way forward in the Gaza war and stresses the Israeli prime minister "wants to go in”. When asked if he prefers that Netanyahu implement the 2nd phase of the hostage deal or go after Hamas Trump said: “I am OK either way"
FDA, which had ramped up staff to review AI and food safety, lost its team evaluating surgical robots and insulin-delivery systems due to layoffs.
news.summary: Despite being funded by industry fees rather than taxpayer money, teams working on advanced surgical robots and insulin-delivery systems faced significant cuts in personnel under the Trump administration. The layoffs impacted a number of individuals involved in evaluating these high-tech medical devices, hampering their progress and potentially delaying the development of innovative healthcare solutions.

news.headline: Latvia plans coalition reshuffle to ease tensions among members.
Immunovia seeks new CFO for US market expansion.incareased focus on test commercialization.
news.summary: In Lund, Sweden on February 21, 2025, Immunovia, a company specializing in pancreatic cancer diagnostics and traded on Nasdaq Stockholm under the symbol IMMNOV, revealed plans for recruitment of a new Chief Financial Officer (CFO). This decision comes as the company shifts its attention towards the American market. Immunovia is in the process of transitioning towards the commercialization of its diagnostic test.

news.headline: Halper Sadeh LLC investigates BLUE, VOXX, CARA, CYTH for potential violations, breaches, involving bluebird bio (NASDAQ: BLUE).
news.summary: A law firm named Halper Sadeh LLC based in New York is currently conducting investigations into various companies for potential violations of federal securities laws and breaches of fiduciary duties to shareholders. One of the companies being scrutinized is bluebird bio, Inc. (NASDAQ: BLUE). The investigation is focused on BLUE's sale activities to ensure compliance with regulations and the protection of shareholder interests. The firm is committed to safeguarding investor rights and maintaining transparency in financial transactions.

news.headline: Trump reiterates 25% tariffs on cars on April 2nd.
Danone, with NGOs ClientEarth, Surfrider Foundation Europe, & Zero Waste France, settle legal case on Danone’s plastic vigilance plan.
Awakening Software partners with WeCanCloneYou.com to launch AI-Powered Virtual Clones promising enhanced productivity.
news.summary: Awakening Software, a tech company located in Sturgeon Falls, Ontario, has partnered with WeCanCloneYou.com to introduce a cutting-edge online platform providing customized virtual clones. This collaboration aims to offer AI-driven solutions that merge users' individual traits, histories, and aspirations for improved task management, increased productivity, and redefined efficiency levels. Setting itself apart from traditional AI systems, the platform revolutionizes the way individuals interact with technology.

news.headline: Tavant named to HousingWire’s Tech100 listing for 7th year in mortgage, 5th year in real estate. quoted CRO Hassan Rashid.
news.summary: In Santa Clara, California, Tavant, a top AI-powered Fintech solutions and software services company, has revealed its inclusion in the HousingWire 2025 Tech100 list for the seventh consecutive year. This recognition identifies Tavant as one of the most innovative and influential Mortgage Technology organizations. Additionally, the company has been listed in the Real Estate category for the fifth year, underscoring its pioneering solutions that are reshaping the housing industry. Tavant's Chief Revenue Officer, Hassan Rashid, expressed his pride in this achievement.

news.headline: UKG ranks #1 for Enterprise Software, #2 for HR and Mid-Market, and #8 overall in G2’s 2025 Best Software Awards.
news.summary: In Lowell, Massachusetts and Weston, Florida, UKG unveiled its latest achievements from G2's 2025 Best Software Awards. The UKG Ready suite stood out by securing the top spot for Enterprise Software products, as recognized by verified end-user feedback. This category pertains to companies with 1,000 or more employees. Moreover, UKG Ready claimed the second position for both HR and Mid-Market software products aimed at companies with 50 to 1,000 employees. In addition, it also secured the eighth spot for Best Software Products overall. G2, known as the world’s largest software marketplace, bestowed these honors based on user reviews.

news.headline: Global multilayer varistor market valued at US$0.5 billion in 2024, expected to reach US$1.1 billion by 2035 with 6.9% CAGR growth. Asia-Pacific leads with China, Taiwan, Japan, significant growth expected in Europe and North America. Key players investing in R&D for high-efficiency MLVs. Growing demand for AI-integrated devices and 5G infrastructure driving market expansion.
news.summary: The global multilayer varistor industry was valued at around US$0.5 billion in 2024 and is projected to grow at a CAGR of 6.9% from 2025 to 2035, reaching approximately US$1.1 billion by the end of the forecast period. The growth is attributed to the increasing adoption of consumer electronics, IoT devices, and electric vehicles that require protection from transient voltage surges. Major markets driving this growth include the Asia-Pacific region, particularly China, Taiwan, and Japan, as well as Europe and North America due to strict EMC regulations and digital infrastructure investments. Key players in the market are focusing on product innovation and strategic collaborations to expand their presence, with companies like TDK Corporation, Panasonic Corporation, Vishay Intertechnology, Inc., and others heavily investing in R&D to develop advanced MLV solutions optimized for 5G infrastructure and automotive applications. Governments worldwide are also investing in digital infrastructure, further boosting the demand for MLVs in telecom equipment. This expansion is driven by the rising need for compact circuit protection solutions and the growth of the automotive electronics industry, particularly ADAS and EVs.

news.headline: West Shore Home partners with PGA TOUR golfer Max Greyserman, ranked No. 36 globally, boosting their brand.
news.summary: Mechanicsburg, Pennsylvania - On February 21, 2025, West Shore Home, a rapidly expanding home remodeling company, revealed its collaboration with PGA TOUR standout Max Greyserman, who currently holds the No. 36 spot in the world golf rankings. This partnership marks a significant milestone for the company as they continue to grow and expand their reach in the industry.

news.headline: Shell Inc. to bolster stake in Ursa platform in Gulf of America, elevating its working interest in the operated asset.
news.summary: In Houston on February 21, 2025, Shell Offshore Inc. and Shell Pipeline Company (SPLC), both subsidiaries of Shell plc, announced a new agreement to boost their ownership in the Ursa platform located in the Gulf of America. This move will result in an increased working interest (WI) for Shell in the platform they manage, with the goal of furthering their presence and operations in the region.

news.headline: ConocoPhillips to sell interest in Ursa and Europa Fields in Houston.
news.summary: Houston-based energy company ConocoPhillips has revealed its plan to divest its ownership in the Ursa and Europa Fields. This decision marks a strategic move by the company to streamline its portfolio and focus on core assets. The deal signifies a significant shift in ConocoPhillips' investment strategy, with the value of the transaction estimated to be in the range of millions. The agreement demonstrates the company's commitment to optimizing its portfolio and maximizing returns for its shareholders.

news.headline: Trump: Companies are coming in, they need more electricity for AI.
Trump: We will let AI companies have their own power plants.
Trump: We need double the energy that we have right now
FHLB Dallas and TexasBank grant $25K to ODWIN in Fort Worth to educate women in Tarrant County on heirs’ property issues.
news.summary: In Fort Worth, Texas, the Federal Home Loan Bank of Dallas (FHLB Dallas) allocated a $25,000 grant through TexasBank to Opening Doors for Women in Need (ODWIN) this week. This grant aims to assist in educating women in Tarrant County about heirs’ property issues. Dr. Sandra Stanley, the founder and CEO of ODWIN, highlighted the importance of this initiative stating, “I’ve seen neighbors lose their property due to a lack of understanding about probate procedures.” The funds will support efforts to empower women and prevent property loss in the community.

news.headline: Michael Saylor urges US to acquire 20% of Bitcoin supply for safety, saying only one nation can do so.
news.summary: The individual cautioned against not implementing the mentioned policy, stating that it could pose risks as only one nation-state would be able to acquire 20% of the network.
